Here's how olfactory anchoring works. Remember, what are the two things that trip you up with NLP? You have to be at the tippy top of the stage. Absolute certainty, right? And number two, you need to have this intense anchor. Memorable, intense, memorable anchor. These are the two problems with NLP. Action about NLP anchoring is the freaking greatest thing in the world. So here's how I solved it. Figure how am I going to do this? How am I going to figure this? Wait a second. I'm like, this is so simple. Rather than trying to go back in your memory and create an artificial pumped up state of certainty, why not just wait until you're really there?
